ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the primary contact */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data (e.g., ptobs, ptphoto) */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the dataset was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Data collection method used */,
  "study_area" TEXT /* Geographic location of the study */,
  "study_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the study */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset has been published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the dataset, if published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory for more specific data types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted user password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details about the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_areas" (
  "study_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study area */,
  "study_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the study area */,
  "study_area_description" TEXT /* Description of the study area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions_files" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id", "file_id")
)
